feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Time makes you bolder
entry.summary:
Author: TheEndIsNeverTheEnd

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,564Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Why do we change so much when you grow up. From Afraid children to Scary Adults, life takes the best of us down the worst path's as punishment for being born. you didn't chose to be born into a rich family just as Jason didn't chose to be born in crime alley.yet life takes you both in 2 different directions that are interwoven. A girl who loses everything, to find herself down a path of crime when she has such a bright future.to a boy who was blessed with escaping crime alley to die at a time when the ones around him needed him the most. only to come back with anger. Will Jason realise he's hunting down his childhood friend, Will the truth ruin everything, or is it what's needed to finally find peace. (im terrible at writing summaries sorry, first chapter might feel rushed but there will be flashbacks.)

entry.title: Burn Rate (Red Hood and you) - Translated
entry.summary:
Author: Vandall

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,062Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: If they think I'm just another cog in their corrupt machine, they're sorely mistaken. My name is ___, and I'm the flame that's here to ignite Gotham, to finally take down those politicians who are only good for stealing while wearing their suits and ties. That's why I love watching them explode! The problem with playing with fire in a city in ruins is that sooner or later you run into the owner of the lighter, and while sometimes it's in my hands... other times it belongs to the gorgeous guy in the red helmet. I've been obsessed with him for almost a year now, wondering: Will you ever be mine, Red Hood? I hope so!

entry.title: Strawberry Waffles
entry.summary:
Author: lushescape

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,286Chapters: 20/20Kudos: 1,073

Summary: “Like a date?” You ask in a near whisper. Jason looks like he's been electrocuted but slowly he nods his head twice. “Yeah. A date. You and me, the school dance.” Oh. Your heart feels like it's beating so fast it's going to stop at any second. But you nod, your face warm, and there's no way you can stop yourself from smiling now. “Um, y- yeah.” You stammer before clearing your throat softly. “Yes.” You say, more confident in your answer. “Yes, I would.. love to go with you. On a date. To the dance.” Or Jason Todd becomes a girl dad after dying and coming back to life

entry.title: The Color Indigo and Red Makes
entry.summary:
Author: qauker_oats

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,824Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 2

Summary: You found the good in most things, though circumstances weren't perfect. Chosen as an indigo lantern for natural compassion, the ring gives you a certain mission after you leave Nok. The mission involves Red Hood and the Outlaws, and the line they are toying with as they clean up criminal activities and do paid favors. So what happens when a compassionate person meets someone who is built on rage and past grief... or are they?

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 136,132Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 812

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Risk
entry.summary:
Author: lushescape

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,393Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 17

Summary: Your father, New Jersey senator turned presidential candidate, has been threatened by an unknown source. And while you are still in the public eye, despite no longer living with your parents, your father insists on appointing you a bodyguard until the source of the threats is found.

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,353Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 34

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him. And now, he had to deal with the feelings that a fortunate meeting had left him even if he had no idea how.

entry.title: Unlocked
entry.summary:
Author: Justcallme_po

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,532Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: In Gotham, leaving a door unlocked should be considered a mistake. For you, it became a ritual — one you waited for with equal parts fear and longing. Every Thursday, Jason Todd finds his way back to your apartment after patrol: bruised, exhausted, and carrying more wounds than he’s willing to admit. You both know how to survive. How to brace yourselves for the pain before it comes. How to live with loss. But after spending so long preparing yourselves to lose everything… Do either of you really know what it means to stay?

entry.title: we're all reaching out to find another hand
entry.summary:
Author: soter

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,726Chapters: 15/18Kudos: 236

Summary: “I know you’re a meta,” you blurt. Jason stares. “What.” “I saw your hand—I saw the cut and the blood, but then, it was healed, somehow, right, and like, I know I wasn’t supposed to see that and then I felt really bad about it and I wanted to let you know that I know but I didn’t want you to think I was going to, like, blackmail you—” “Blackmail me?” “Of course not,” you quickly say. “Never. No. That’s horrible. Can you imagine what would happen if it got out?” You wince. “Sorry, stupid question, you probably have.”or in which you discover that your neighbor, Jason Todd, is a metahuman, try to compensate, and things get a little... weird.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Eventually the colour red
entry.summary:
Author: Jaybird_0123

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,455Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 240

Summary: (I’m shit at summary’s but I swear my story’s good ish)Jason Todd is Robin and one of the biggest Cinderella story’s in Gotham, and you, well you’re just some crime alley kid. But so was Jason so on his first day of school( where he seems a bit to familiar) when he sees you getting bullied by a girl for the same reasons he always used to get bullied for he decides to befriend you and (while being hopelessly in love) protect you, as a friend of course, but when it develops into more he tries to help you and it spirals into misunderstandings and fear (they work it out) and a bunch of fluff , but How long can it go on like an annoyingly cute high school romance till everything turns to a bloody red mess.Not long apparently.

entry.title: You Pretty Boys Are Only Good For One Thing
entry.summary:
Author: Anxe_m

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,388Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Gotham is not a city that believes in mercy.Especially not for people like you.New. Unfamiliar. Easy to break.Your first assignment as an agent was supposed to be simple.Instead, it dropped you here. into a city where the shadows feel alive and the nights stretch a little too long.You’ve heard the stories, read news articles.About Batman.But Gotham isn’t just his city.You’ll learn that soon enough.

entry.title: stubble
entry.summary:
Author: syrencore

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 472Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Slow strokes of the razor down his jaw left behind clear skin. You pressed your hips to his as you moved closer. A low grunt left him."Don't tempt me while you have a blade to my neck."You suppressed the urge to grin. "One track mind, huh?" You teased, shifting more deliberately just to tease him, earning a half-hearted glare."Brat.""Hush, let me concentrate."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Jason Todd/Reader
  • Jason Todd

entry.title: Have you found it yet?
entry.summary:
Author: lixsznshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,246Chapters: 2/27Kudos: 11

Summary: There were many reasons to be sad in Gotham. First of all, because you have the misfortune of living in Gotham. In close second, the endless threat of whatever supercriminal that had decided today was the day the world ends. Third, it stinks. There were many reasons to hate your life if you lived in Gotham. You could breathe the wrong way and get stabbed, or god forbid you decide to carry some cash on you - you’d practically be walking into your own grave at that point. It seems you’ve failed at everything that you’ve tried in your life, including finding a reason to explain your never-ending sadness.

entry.title: COLOR ME, YOU
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,477Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 49

Summary: "Can you cosplay as Red Hood for me, pretty please?"How does a minor crush on the hot guy at the library lead you to ask Jason Todd to be your muse. A story about how hope when given, returns to you when you least expect it. cross posted on tumblr @luviery
